subcodes.first_line: O thou who lovest the Dawning-Place of the lights of love! Love hath four degrees, renowned and manifest. The first is the love from God unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محب مطلع انوار محبت را مراتب اربعه مذکور و مشهور اول محبت من الله الی
subcodes.subjects: @four; five pathways of love, @firmness in the Covenant, @love of God
